findings.title: Command injection via string concatenation in execSync
findings.evidence: execSync("tar -czf out.tgz " + path) concatenates the path parameter directly into a shell command without escaping. An attacker controlling the path argument can inject shell metacharacters to execute arbitrary commands.

notes: Diff Drift correctly flags the child_process import as high severity. The specific vulnerability is command injection through unsanitized string concatenation of the path parameter into the execSync call.

evaluator.note: Benchmark v4 multi-model panel; blind, packet-only context.
